descriptions.value: This complex and aromatic flower is the symbol of love and marriage, famous for its beauty and perfume. However, the rose bud blossom symbolizes the secret and mystery of life.

The earth element is one of four primary elements, in addition to the elements of air, water and heat.

Opposing the sky, has its symbology linked to passive and feminine principles, the Yin and also the creation, since in many ancient mythologies are tales of giving the primordial life from a piece of earth or clay .

The Moon symbolizes the biological rhythms, and the phases of life, as it passes by a regular life cycle, since it is a star growing, decreases, increases again and disappears. Thus, the moon is subject to the universal law of becoming, birth and death, and the representation of the passage from life to death.
In various churches of the world there triangles with letters YHWH in their midst.

Definitely the best known Christian symbol, which also is called the Latin cross. The Romans used to execute criminals. Because of this, it reminds us of the sacrifice that Jesus Christ offered for the sins of the people. In addition to the crucifixion, it is the resurrection and eternal life.
The chairs accompany us in most of our day. And notice this importance all, just stop to think how much time we spend sitting in it, whether working, playing, talking or making meals.

"This world is big and full of possibilities, you can’t limit yourself on mere numbers!"
"Yes, this is a calculator, a godly one. It can count almost anything as long as the problem is well-defined"
"A country, no matter how small, they've got real people livin’ there and they've got their own dreams!"
"No, you do not understand. My wish is impossible to be attained through mere effort."

"I was supposed to win! 
Then those scary sixth-graders wouldn't bully me again, I will finally have some friends…"

Sausage used to live in the Flatulent City of
the Pigsties, the exotically aromatic former
lair of the space pigs. However, his world
was invaded by the Brain Monster, and
now the space pigs can't fly freely,
releasing their gas in the streets.
Sausage dreams with the day his
world will be free again and he can,
once again, live in peace with his wife
and kids. Until that day comes, he'll fight
bravely, using the power from his
atomic fart!

descriptions.name: Sausage! The mighty space pig!
descriptions.type: A grande bagunça espacial - The big space mess Trading Card

tags.localized_tag_name: A grande bagunça espacial - The big space mess

descriptions.value:
Corncob, the powerful space corn, was the
keeper of the fields of the Small Planet of
June. The Brain Monster also invaded his
planet and prohibited the dances and the
corn crops. Corncob uses his powerful
popcorn to fight the Brain Monster
troops. He dreams about being very
famous, and his only fear is to be eaten
by someone.

descriptions.name: Corncob! The mighty space corn!
descriptions.type: A grande bagunça espacial - The big space mess Trading Card

descriptions.value:
Waldisglédson was just a common pizza boy
when, one day, his girlfriend was kidnapped
by the Brain Monster from Space.
That day, Waldisglédson joined
the Crazy Squad to save her.
On his flying motorcycle, equipped
with an armor circle, or on a beautiful
spaceship that shoots a powerful
beam, he's the leading character
of our story.

descriptions.name: Waldisglédson
descriptions.type: A grande bagunça espacial - The big space mess Trading Card

descriptions.value: He's the leader of banditry. With his friend Captain Robot, he wants to practice evil deeds and became a successful villain like his father. Using mind-controlling machines and evil robots, he steals banks, kidnaps defenseless damsels and destroys planets. Looks like he even wants to be a politician.

descriptions.name: Brain Monster from Space (Trading Card)

descriptions.value:
Black holes are gateways that take you to the Edge of the Universe. For some reason, no plant or fungus grow there. The air is dry, the water doesn't quench the thirst and doesn't even make things wet. The food can't be stored for too long, because even inside the fridge it spoils, and a deep fear of everything takes over anyone who spends too much time in this place. Whole cities are built, but are abandoned soon after their inauguration. Modern factories are opened and closed in just a few months, no matter how many clients they have. In short, it's impossible to inhabit this place before understanding and solving this problem.
	Strangely, things like batteries, power cells and fuels are very durable there. A gas-powered machine can stay on for years. In some cases, the rust destroys the machine before it runs out of fuel.
	The Edge of the Universe isn't exactly the limit of the universe, because the thin layer isn't visible or touchable from the inside and can only be reached through the black holes.
	But, if we imagine the universe as a bubble, we'd be on the inside, and these black holes would take us to the thin layer on the outside.

descriptions.name: Edge of the Universe (Trading Card)
descriptions.type: A grande bagunça espacial - The big space mess Trading Card

Are you sure you want to see this?
The Yellow Area in the Yon dimension represents the Intuition of the player. Understanding what to do and solving it quickly is crucial here.
The Red Area is an atypical "maze" challenge. The navitagional skills of the player will be needed to complete the area.
The green area features a series of sequences to reproduce. Memorizing the sequence will make the player save time, having less time-jumps and less clones.
The blue area will require the "knowledge" of the player about himself. Some portals across the area will send the player in the previous areas, bring back a cube in the blue area.
The time machine governs the time and space of all the dimension. Repairing it is crucial to stop time rewinds and paradoxes
The Lagomorph Shadow is a misterious masked figure. It is very shy but it could be a redoubtable enemy if you encounter it. Its wearings are familiar to Katherine.

descriptions.name: The Lagomorph Shadow
descriptions.type: Insane Decay of Mind: The Labyrinth Trading Card

tags.localized_tag_name: Insane Decay of Mind: The Labyrinth

descriptions.value: The Colossal Shadow is the most elegant and serious Shadow of all. It is the allegorical corrispondent of insanity and it will not leave you until the very end. It reminds to Katherine a father figure.

descriptions.name: The Colossal Shadow
descriptions.type: Insane Decay of Mind: The Labyrinth Trading Card

tags.localized_tag_name: Insane Decay of Mind: The Labyrinth

descriptions.value: The Pale Shadow is a white skinned skeleton-like Shadow. As soon as it sees Katherine, she is doomed to get killed by its long claws. Katherine recognize her as a mother figure.

descriptions.name: The Pale Shadow
descriptions.type: Insane Decay of Mind: The Labyrinth Trading Card

tags.localized_tag_name: Insane Decay of Mind: The Labyrinth

descriptions.value: The Creeping Shadow is the hardest bicephalous Shadow Katherine will ever fight. Thanks to its two faces, it will see her everywhere you go. Bicephalous Shadows arise when Katherine tries to kill a Shadow

descriptions.name: The Creeping Shadow
descriptions.type: Insane Decay of Mind: The Labyrinth Trading Card

tags.localized_tag_name: Insane Decay of Mind: The Labyrinth

descriptions.name: The Childish Shadow
descriptions.type: Insane Decay of Mind: The Labyrinth Trading Card

descriptions.value: This is the most basic drone of Mind Unleashed. Easy to kill,but in group they could be dangerous.
A powerful military mech with two deadly cannons. It's an high threat even if alone.
A small and cute drone that can explode on you to death. It will sacrifice itself to kill you,you have been warned!
The electro drone is a strategic robot. He shoot at you dealing damage and let the electricity do the rest. Be prepared to multiple electroshocks!
A stationary turret with high damage and precision. Few shots and you could be dead without even notice them.
